spec_match.rationale: Shows library version-to-version delta evolution — the canonical CDT use case.

interactive.rationale: Version timeline buttons swap source views with diff highlighting.

edge_cases.rationale: Linear v1->v2->v3->v4 walk; no v1->v4 skip case.

design_system.rationale: Uses color-mix(in srgb, var(--accent-emerald) 15%, transparent) for tinted highlights — rule-#5 compliant.

openQuestions.title: Add a 'skip-versions' branch
openQuestions.detail: If a user upgrades v1 directly to v4 with no intermediate caches, show whether v1 is still useful or whether CDT falls back to plain brotli.

openQuestions.title: Show compressed-byte savings per version pair
openQuestions.detail: Adding a 'compressed N->M bytes' panel per version transition would make value tangible.
